title: hannafordia quadrivalvis subsp. quadrivalvis
intro: Hannafordia quadrivalvis subsp. quadrivalvis, a plant species belonging to the family Cunoniaceae, is native to Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, making it useful for treating various conditions such as arthritis and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Hannafordia quadrivalvis subsp. quadrivalvis can be obtained through infusions or decoctions of the leaves or bark, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
